name: Maintenance report
about: Refactoring, cleanup, dependency upgrades, and housekeeping
title: "Maintenance: "
---

## Maintenance Guidelines
Please describe the maintenance need and how we should validate the change.

## Description
What should be cleaned up/refactored/upgraded?

## Motivation
Why is this needed now (risk, stability, performance, security, DX)?

## Proposed Approach
High-level steps you expect to take.

## Verification Plan
How will we confirm everything still works after the change?

## Additional Context
Links, logs, or relevant references.
